title: dodecatheon meadia subsp. hugeri
intro: Dodecatheon meadia subsp. hugeri, also known as the Eastern shooting star, is a perennial flowering plant native to North America. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Dodecatheon meadia subsp. hugeri include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety as a medicinal herb.
